title: colymbada ragusina
intro: Colymbada ragusina, also known as Ragwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Colymbada ragusina include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Colymbada ragusina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
